profile.name: Alex Morgan
profile.summary: Senior product strategy professional with 8+ years driving go-to-market execution, cross-functional alignment, and data-driven decision making across SaaS, HR Tech, and enterprise software. Proven track record of launching products that achieve market fit, scaling operations from startup to growth stage, and building high-performing teams. Passionate about connecting people to meaningful work through technology.

evidence.outcome: Developed 3-year product roadmap that captured $12M in new ARR across 3 market segments
Led strategic planning workshops for cross-functional teams of 25+ stakeholders quarterly
Launched 4 major product features achieving 85%+ adoption within first quarter
Managed product lifecycle from concept through GA for enterprise SaaS platform serving 200+ clients
Built analytics dashboards tracking 15 KPIs that drove 22% improvement in conversion rates
Designed A/B testing framework that reduced feature validation time by 40%
Led cross-functional team of 18 across engineering, design, marketing, and sales
Facilitated alignment between product and engineering reducing sprint scope creep by 35%
Conducted competitive analysis across 12 vendors informing pricing strategy and feature prioritization
Managed relationships with C-suite executives, presenting quarterly business reviews to CEO and board
Delivered 12 projects on time and within budget using Agile methodology across distributed teams
Identified and closed 3 strategic partnership deals generating $2.5M in pipeline
Built product strategy team from 2 to 8 members with 95% retention rate over 3 years
Created ROI models for product investments that secured $4M in development funding
Presented product vision to audiences of 500+ at 3 industry conferences
Authored thought leadership content generating 50K+ views and 200+ qualified leads
Resolved critical platform scalability issue that was blocking $3M enterprise deal
Improved NPS from 32 to 58 by implementing structured feedback loops with top 50 accounts
Certified Scrum Product Owner; led 6 concurrent Agile teams through SAFe framework
Designed and executed GTM strategy for new product line achieving 140% of first-year revenue target
Collaborated with HR to redesign hiring process reducing time-to-fill by 25%
Led organizational restructuring affecting 60+ employees with zero unplanned attrition
Negotiated vendor contracts saving $1.2M annually across 5 technology partnerships
Redesigned product development lifecycle reducing cycle time from 16 weeks to 10 weeks
Led user research program interviewing 100+ customers informing UX redesign that improved task completion by 30%
Implemented RevOps framework aligning sales, marketing, and CS metrics to single revenue dashboard
Identified market timing risk that prevented $5M investment in declining product category
Delivered executive presentations that secured board approval for 3 strategic initiatives
Managed $8M annual product budget with consistent under-budget delivery (avg 4% savings)

workHistory.title: Senior Product Strategy Manager
workHistory.description: Lead product strategy for AI-powered talent matching platform. Own roadmap, GTM execution, and cross-functional alignment across 40-person product org.

workHistory.title: Product Manager
workHistory.description: Managed enterprise analytics product from MVP through Series B growth. Drove product-led growth initiatives that tripled user base.

workHistory.title: Associate Product Manager
workHistory.description: Supported product development for cloud infrastructure platform. Led customer discovery, feature prioritization, and sprint planning.

education.institution: University of Texas at Austin - McCombs School of Business
